meaning: n.笑者,哄笑者,好笑的一边倒比赛
examples: We give them a sense of humor because laugher leavens life.
In your laugher you have the music of the fountain of life.
I shall roll on and on, and break upon your lap with laugher.
Crescent Real Estate Equities (offices, hotels, cold storage) is the laugher in this group.
This one was such a laugher that their starters didn't play the fourth quarter.
